creator: frankch@waru.life.nthu.edu.tw
text:
This is kinemage, a molecular visualization program which is 
	suitable for educational usage. This program only available in 
	binary form, and we could only use the linux binary. Though not
	a native program, it runs fast, and produce high quality images.

Fix: 

The port tarball kinemage-port.tgz is in 
	ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/
